title: Executive Order 11354—Amending Executive Order No. 11030 of June 19, 1962, with Respect to the Preparation of Presidential Proclamations

flags.justification: A narrow, technical amendment to proclamation-drafting and filing procedures.
Multiple related procedural amendments all coherently amend one existing procedural order.
An internal drafting-procedure amendment, not a compliance regime.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A standing procedural framework, evergreen by nature.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
An extremely narrow, technical drafting-formality amendment.
No second agency's competing mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.
